nodes.name: pr-quality-agent SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive skill documentation for the PR quality agent providing automated pull request analysis, review heuristics, and quality scoring guidance.

nodes.name: pr-to-course manifest
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the pr-to-course skill that converts pull requests into structured learning courses with interactive elements.

nodes.name: design-system.md (pr-to-course)
nodes.summary: Design system reference for generating course content from PRs, defining typography, color, spacing, and visual component standards for learning materials.

nodes.name: interactive-elements.md (pr-to-course)
nodes.summary: Extensive reference covering interactive course elements including quizzes, code playgrounds, progressive disclosure panels, and assessment frameworks for PR-derived courses.

nodes.name: pr-to-course SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for converting pull request diffs into structured educational courses with explanations, exercises, and knowledge checks.

nodes.name: prisma-orm-patterns manifest
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the Prisma ORM patterns skill with references to schema and query optimization resources.

nodes.name: prisma-reference.md
nodes.summary: Reference documentation for Prisma ORM patterns covering schema definition, relation modeling, query optimization, migrations, and type safety.

nodes.name: prisma-orm-patterns SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documentation guiding users through Prisma ORM usage, relation modeling, and production-grade query patterns.

nodes.name: prompt-architect manifest
nodes.summary: Skill manifest for the prompt-architect skill providing LLM prompt design and evaluation capabilities.

nodes.name: framework_analyzer.py
nodes.summary: Recommends appropriate LLM prompting frameworks (CO-STAR, RISEN, RISE-IE, etc.) based on task type analysis using keyword and indicator matching.

nodes.name: prompt_evaluator.py
nodes.summary: Evaluates LLM prompt quality across clarity, completeness, structure, and effectiveness dimensions, producing scored assessments and improvement suggestions.

nodes.name: prompt-architect SKILL.md
nodes.summary: Skill documentation for designing high-quality LLM prompts using established frameworks, evaluation criteria, and iterative refinement.
